name: vscode-gherkin-powertools
displayName: Gherkin PowerTools: BDD Formatter, Linter & Python Behave
description: Advanced BDD extension for feature files. Offers AST-based Gherkin formatting, strict linting, and context-aware Python Behave step definition navigation.
author: Carlos Camara

gherkinPowerTools.indentation.steps.description: Number of spaces to indent steps.

gherkinPowerTools.tables.alignToKeyword.description: If true, tables align dynamically to the start of the step text. If false, tables simply indent slightly more than the step keyword.

gherkinPowerTools.tags.format.description: How to format long lists of tags. 'wrap' splits them across multiple lines (max 80 chars), 'singleLine' keeps them all on one line.

gherkinPowerTools.tags.sort.description: How to sort tags. 'preserve' keeps their original source order, 'alphabetical' sorts them A-Z.

gherkinPowerTools.emptyLines.betweenScen.description: Number of empty lines to enforce between Scenario/Rule/Background blocks.

gherkinPowerTools.behave.stepGlobs.description: Glob patterns to locate Python/Behave step definition files.

gherkinPowerTools.behave.ignoreGlobs.description: Glob patterns to ignore when locating Python/Behave step definition files.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Gherkin PowerTools
walkthroughs.description: Learn how to format, lint, and navigate your BDD features.

steps.title: Open or create a feature file
steps.description: Open a `.feature` file to activate Gherkin PowerTools.

steps.title: Format your Gherkin
steps.description: Format your features to align tables and standardize indentation. [Format Document](command:editor.action.formatDocument)

steps.title: Enable Format on Save
steps.description: Save time by enabling VS Code's Format on Save setting for Gherkin files. [Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22%5Bfeature%5D%20editor.formatOnSave%22)

steps.title: Configure Behave Step Discovery
steps.description: If your Python steps are not in the default `features/steps` folder, update the Step Globs setting. [Configure Step Globs](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22gherkinPowerTools.behave.stepGlobs%22)

steps.title: Navigate to Python Steps
steps.description: Right-click a step and select **Go to Definition** (F12) to jump straight to the Python implementation. [Go to Definition](command:editor.action.revealDefinition)

steps.title: View BDD Statistics
steps.description: Generate an interactive HTML dashboard with your BDD project metrics. [Show Statistics](command:gherkinPowerTools.showStatistics)

steps.title: Find Documentation & Support
steps.description: Read the full documentation or ask questions on our GitHub Discussions. [Open Repository](https://github.com/carlos-camara/vscode-gherkin-powertools)

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run esbuild
